name: Using Examples
description: Learn how the live code examples work - preview, source, copy, Playground, and tabbed variants.

steps.title: Live Examples
steps.task: Every page ships a runnable example - not a screenshot.

steps.title: It's Live
steps.task: This is the real component running. We just selected "apple" to show it responding to state.

steps.title: Real Source
steps.task: Every example ships the exact code that produces it. We expanded it for you - the Expand pill collapses it again anytime.
steps.learn: Read the source behind an example

steps.title: Copy It
steps.task: This button copies the whole file to your clipboard in one click.

steps.title: Play With It
steps.task: This button opens the example live in the Playground - full editing, no setup.
steps.learn: Open an example in the Playground

steps.title: Tune the View
steps.task: The rest of the toolbar tunes the reading view - code size cycling and line wrap for long lines.
steps.learn: Adjust code size and line wrap

steps.title: More Ways to Read
steps.task: Some pages show multiple variants in tabbed code, like this package-manager picker - we switched it to "npm" to show it in action.

steps.title: That's Examples
steps.task: Every page works this way - read it, copy it, play with it.
steps.learn: Use examples like a power user
